positive: A detailed, symmetrically composed pattern of glowing bioluminescent flora intertwined with minimalist astronomical elements. Focus on deep indigo and sapphire blues contrasted sharply with brilliant ethereal gold and jade green accents. The composition features stylized mandalas formed by crescent moons, swirling nebulas, and exotic, glowing jungle flowers (like phosphorescent lotus and fern). The artwork must be highly detailed, tattoo-style, clean-lined, and suitable for a seamless textile repeat print. Use dramatic volumetric lighting that highlights the glowing edges of the plants and cosmic structures. High contrast, mystical, perfect symmetry, clean silhouette, vector art aesthetic, ultra-high definition.
negative: blurry, low quality, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, busy, grainy, noise, asymmetrical, cropped, disfigured, bad anatomy, extra limbs
